name: @myndhyve/wop-conformance
description: Black-box conformance test suite for WOP-compliant servers. FINAL v1.0 (suite at 1.14.0). 1.14.0 closes LT3 fully: staleClaim multi-process scenario (process A dies mid-run, process B boots + resumes after claim TTL expires). Plus new lib/multiProcess.ts harness for spawning host child processes with direct PID control. Opt-in via WOP_RUN_STALE_CLAIM=1. 1.13.0 added LT3 timing-sensitive scenarios: streamReconnect, replayDeterminism, interruptRace + new wop-replay-fork profile. 1.12.0 added LT5 debug-bundle. 1.11.0 added LT3 partial: idempotencyRetry, redactionAdversarial, providerPolicyEnforcement, maliciousManifest, eventOrdering.
